creator: scott@renfro.org
text:
Please review and commit the attached patch (against cvs, not the
previous patches).  It upgrades ethereal to 0.8.19 and incorporates the
snmp inclusion, catching the new binaries and man pages in
ethereal-0.8.19.

cheers,
--Scott
